THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, KEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MY, LE HUNG DBA SILVER CAR CARE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $552.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED, BUT BOTH PARTIES APPEARED. PERSONAL CHECK FOR $552.00 PAID IN COURT.
